audience_policies.source_phrase: Each pass allows two adults and up to four children into the Seacoast Science Center at a 50% discount. Pass will need to be presented to the Odiorne Point State Park tollbooth attendant and the Center's greeter even if you already have reservations.

coupon.source_phrase_block: Each pass allows two adults and up to four children into the Seacoast Science Center at a 50% discount. Pass will need to be presented to the Odiorne Point State Park tollbooth attendant and the Center's greeter even if you already have reservations.
